description.title: What is iAgents Hub?
description.body: iAgents Hub is a self-hosted AI agents platform. It lets you configure, manage and test AI agents connected to multiple providers from a unified interface. Define your agent once and run it with whichever model you prefer.

github.title: Source code
github.body: iAgents Hub is an open source project. Contributions are welcome.
github.label: View on GitHub

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions, suggestions, or want to collaborate?
